content:
## 📦 SanchoCMO v2.7.0 — 2026-03-22

### ✨ Added
- **`larry`** — App growth agent (TikTok posting, RevenueCat, analytics, competitor research, slides, daily reports)
- **`tiktok-growth`** — TikTok growth playbook completo (analytics, competitors, content, posting, onboarding)
- **`metricool`** — Metricool API (scheduling, best-time, brands, scheduled posts)
- **`apify`** — Apify Actors via REST API + OpenAPI spec
- **`gsc`** — Google Search Console directo (Python + Service Account)
- **`native-google-analytics`** — GA4 nativo via Python + Analytics Data API
- **`instagram-content`**, **`linkedin-content`**, **`twitter-content`** — Social content skills por plataforma
- **`niche-presentation`** — Generador de presentaciones de nicho
- **`new-client-protocol.md`** — Protocolo de onboarding automatizado (template Discord + `new-client.sh` + verificación)
- **Escudero PRD suite** — 7 docs de arquitectura del bot Escudero + Bots Engagement PDR

### 🔄 Changed
- **SOUL.md** — Nueva regla P0 #14 (mandatory `read()` de references/). Fix URL pattern MC (`brand/{slug}/` obligatorio)
- **`mc-links-protocol.md`** — URLs con segmento `brand/{slug}/` obligatorio + ejemplos
- **`project-threads-protocol.md`** — Playbook link en hilos de tarea. Rename protocol por estado (✅❌⛔🔧). Sync bidireccional Discord ↔ JSON ↔ MC
- **`competitor-intelligence`** — Refactor mayor + scraping reference guide
- **`metrics-collector`** — Adapters GA4, GHL, Meta Ads actualizados
- **6 skills más** actualizados (ad-creative, lead-magnet, insight-to-content-mapper, strategic-plan, content-calendar-planner, last30days)

### 🗑️ Removed
- **`content-miner`**, **`lead-magnets`**, **`product-marketing-context`** — Eliminados (consolidados o reemplazados)
- **Legacy cleanup** — Workspace antiguo, brand/ legacy, config backups obsoletos

📄 CHANGELOG completo: `CHANGELOG.md`
